name: Free Online XMind Viewer - ATools
description: Open and preview .xmind files online. Runs locally in your browser (no uploads) with Canvas preview and Markdown outline export.
seoDescription: A fast, privacy-first XMind Viewer that opens .xmind files directly in your browser with zero uploads. Supports both modern content.json and classic content.xml formats, provides a large Canvas mind map preview (pan/zoom/fit), and lets you copy or download a Markdown outline for notes, planning, and knowledge management.

ui.keepOneCanvasAlert: At least one canvas must remain.
ui.fileExtHint: Tip: file extension is not .xmind, but parsing will still be attempted.
ui.parseFailed: Parsing failed. Please make sure the file is a valid .xmind.
ui.dropTip: Supports click upload/click replace and drag upload/drag replace (local parsing, no upload)
ui.selectNodeTip: Select a node to start editing.
ui.rootNodeTip: Root node cannot be deleted and cannot add siblings.
ui.nodeEditTip: You can edit, add/remove, and collapse/expand the selected node.
ui.noteBlock: Note: .xmind is essentially a ZIP file. This version supports content.json (new) and content.xml (legacy), and provides basic Canvas editing.
ui.tutorial1: Drag and drop or choose a .xmind file (processed locally, never uploaded).
ui.tutorial2: If the file contains multiple sheets, switch with the selector above.
ui.tutorial3: Canvas supports select, +/- collapse, drag-pan, wheel zoom, and double-click fit-to-view.
ui.tutorial4: Use Node Editor to rename/add/remove nodes. Undo/redo is supported and local draft autosave is enabled.
ui.tutorial5: Copy or download Markdown in Outline Preview for Obsidian/Notion/Lark docs.
ui.faqFormatDesc: Supports content.json (newer XMind) and content.xml (older XMind 8/Classic). If parsing fails, try Save As a compatible format in XMind first.
ui.faqNoContentDesc: The file may use an older format, or content.json may be missing in the ZIP. Check the ZIP entries list on the left.
ui.privacyDesc: Parsing and rendering run locally in your browser. No mind map content is uploaded.
ui.draftDetected: A local unfinished draft was detected
ui.draftPrompt: Restore and continue editing? (draft is stored in your local browser only)

parseErrors.invalid_zip: This file is not a valid .xmind ZIP or it is corrupted.
parseErrors.content_json_parse_failed: Found content.json, but parsing failed (file may be corrupted or encoding is invalid).
parseErrors.content_json_sheet_not_found: Found content.json, but no valid sheet data was recognized (format may differ).
parseErrors.content_xml_parse_failed: Found content.xml, but parsing failed (format may differ or file is corrupted).
parseErrors.content_entry_not_found: Neither content.json nor content.xml was found (not an XMind file or format not supported yet).
